domain_description:
投放域覆盖营销投放业务，包含展位、内容投放、效果追踪等核心场景。
业务范围：
- 展位效果：曝光、点击、转化等指标分析
- 内容效果：曝光、点击、转化等指标分析
- 任务效果：曝光、点击、转化等指标分析
---

global_rules.join_rule: 优先使用 DWS 汇总表；仅当需要用户级明细或明细字段时使用 DWD，并按业务外键关联 DIM 表。
global_rules.dt_rule: 所有投放域查询必须过滤 dt 分区；线上环境优先补充 environment = 'R'。

table_list.description: 流量分发指标日增汇总表（**优先使用**）

tables.description: 投放曝光点击轻度汇总表

columns.name: delivery_task_name
columns.description: 投放任务名称；举例： "12.29-生活频道-北上-$90"

columns.name: industry_org_name
columns.description: 行业名称；数字生活_积分, 数字金融_自营金融, 数字支付_交通等

columns.name: content_id
columns.cn_name: 投放内容ID / 供给ID / 商户ID
columns.description: 投放内容ID / 供给ID / 商户ID；举例：sgprodsg_maga_hktraffic_static_content...

columns.name: title
columns.cn_name: 投放内容标题 / 供给名称 / 商户名称
columns.description: 投放内容标题 / 供给名称 / 商户名称；举例：流失電訊用戶首頁卡片

columns.name: content_type
columns.description: 内容类型；STATIC_CONTENT, POINT_TASK, BENEFIT, SALE_BENEFIT, EXCHANGE, BRAND, TICKET, MINI_APP, SIM

columns.name: traffic_type
columns.description: 流量类型；NON_COMMERCIAL_COMPETITIVE(竞争流量), COMMERCIAL(商业化流量), NON_COMMERCIAL_BUDGET(预算流量)

columns.name: is_public
columns.description: 是否公域展位；1（公域）/ 0（非公域）

columns.name: environment
columns.description: 环境标识；R: Released（线上）/ P: Pre（预发），线上查询必须过滤 environment = 'R'

columns.name: expo_pv_1d
columns.description: 曝光PV / 流量消耗；预存字段，直接 SUM(expo_pv_1d)

columns.name: clk_pv_1d
columns.description: 点击PV；预存字段，直接 SUM(clk_pv_1d)

columns.name: expo_uv（计算指标）
columns.description: 曝光UV；COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN expo_pv_1d > 0 THEN user_id END)

columns.name: clk_uv（计算指标）
columns.description: 点击UV；COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN clk_pv_1d > 0 THEN user_id END)

examples:
SELECT
    space_name,
    SUM(expo_pv_1d) AS expo_pv,
    SUM(clk_pv_1d) AS clk_pv,
    ROUND(SUM(clk_pv_1d) / NULLIF(SUM(expo_pv_1d), 0), 4) AS pv_ctr
FROM dws_hk_asap_mkt_distribute_index_1d
WHERE dt = '${bizdate}'
  AND environment = 'R'
GROUP BY space_name
ORDER BY expo_pv DESC

SELECT
    space_name,
    SUM(expo_pv_1d) AS expo_pv,
    SUM(clk_pv_1d) AS clk_pv,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN expo_pv_1d > 0 THEN user_id END) AS expo_uv,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN clk_pv_1d > 0 THEN user_id END) AS clk_uv,
    ROUND(
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN clk_pv_1d > 0 THEN user_id END)
        / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN expo_pv_1d > 0 THEN user_id END), 0)
    , 4) AS uv_ctr
FROM dws_hk_asap_mkt_distribute_index_1d
WHERE dt = '${bizdate}'
  AND space_name = '首页feeds'
  AND environment = 'R'
GROUP BY space_name

SELECT
    dt,
    SUM(expo_pv_1d) AS expo_pv,
    SUM(clk_pv_1d) AS clk_pv,
    ROUND(SUM(clk_pv_1d) / NULLIF(SUM(expo_pv_1d), 0), 4) AS pv_ctr
FROM dws_hk_asap_mkt_distribute_index_1d
WHERE dt >= DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB('${bizdate}', 6), 'yyyyMMdd')
  AND dt <= '${bizdate}'
  AND space_name = '首页feeds'
  AND environment = 'R'
GROUP BY dt
ORDER BY dt

SELECT
    space_name,
    SUM(expo_pv_1d) AS compete_expo_pv
FROM dws_hk_asap_mkt_distribute_index_1d
WHERE dt = '${bizdate}'
  AND traffic_type = 'NON_COMMERCIAL_COMPETITIVE'
  AND environment = 'R'
GROUP BY space_name
ORDER BY compete_expo_pv DESC

SELECT
    content_id,
    title,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN expo_pv_1d > 0 THEN user_id END) AS expo_uv,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN clk_pv_1d > 0 THEN user_id END) AS clk_uv,
    ROUND(
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN clk_pv_1d > 0 THEN user_id END)
        / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN expo_pv_1d > 0 THEN user_id END), 0)
    , 4) AS uv_ctr
FROM dws_hk_asap_mkt_distribute_index_1d
WHERE dt >= DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB('${bizdate}', 6), 'yyyyMMdd')
  AND dt <= '${bizdate}'
  AND is_public = 1
  AND slot_id = 2
  AND environment = 'R'
GROUP BY content_id, title
ORDER BY uv_ctr DESC
LIMIT 1

SELECT
    SUM(expo_pv_1d) AS total_expo_pv,
    SUM(clk_pv_1d) AS total_clk_pv,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN expo_pv_1d > 0 THEN user_id END) AS total_expo_uv
FROM dws_hk_asap_mkt_distribute_index_1d
WHERE dt = '${bizdate}'
  AND environment = 'R'

SELECT

    log_type,
    COUNT(*) AS expo_pv,
    COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS expo_uv
FROM dwd_hk_asap_mkt_log_expo_di
WHERE dt = '${bizdate}'

columns.description: 日志来源渠道；native, h5, cashier

columns.description: 展位名称；举例： 首页feeds

columns.name: delivery_task_name
columns.description: 投放任务名称；举例： 12.29-生活频道-北上-$90

columns.description: 行业名称；数字生活_积分, 数字金融_自营金融等

columns.name: traffic_type
columns.description: 流量类型；NON_COMMERCIAL_COMPETITIVE(竞争流量), COMMERCIAL(商业化流量), NON_COMMERCIAL_BUDGET(预算流量)

columns.name: is_public
columns.description: 是否公域展位；1（公域）/ 0（非公域）

examples:
SELECT 
    dt,
    COUNT(*) AS clk_pv,
    COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS clk_uv
FROM dwd_hk_asap_mkt_log_clk_di
WHERE dt = '${bizdate}'
GROUP BY dt

SELECT 
    delivery_task_id,
    COUNT(*) AS total_clk,
    COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS clk_uv
FROM dwd_hk_asap_mkt_log_clk_di
WHERE dt = '${bizdate}'
GROUP BY delivery_task_id
ORDER BY total_clk DESC

SELECT 
    log_type,
    COUNT(*) AS clk_pv,
    COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS clk_uv
FROM dwd_hk_asap_mkt_log_clk_di
WHERE dt = '${bizdate}'
GROUP BY log_type

SELECT 
    t.delivery_task_id,
    SUM(t.expo_pv) AS expo_pv,
    SUM(t.clk_pv) AS clk_pv,
    ROUND(SUM(t.clk_pv) / NULLIF(SUM(t.expo_pv), 0), 4) AS ctr
FROM (
    SELECT 
        delivery_task_id,
        0 AS expo_pv,
        COUNT(*) AS clk_pv
    FROM dwd_hk_asap_mkt_log_clk_di
    WHERE dt = '${bizdate}'
    GROUP BY delivery_task_id
    
    UNION ALL
    
    SELECT 
        delivery_task_id,
        COUNT(*) AS expo_pv,
        0 AS clk_pv
    FROM dwd_hk_asap_mkt_log_expo_di
    WHERE dt = '${bizdate}'
    GROUP BY delivery_task_id
) t
GROUP BY t.delivery_task_id

tables.description: 投放任务维度表，存储投放任务的配置信息和状态

columns.name: delivery_task_name
columns.description: 投放任务名称；12.29-生活频道-北上-$90

columns.name: delivery_task_status
columns.description: 投放任务状态；RELEASED, PAUSED, FINISHED

columns.name: industry_org_name
columns.description: 行业名称；数字生活_积分, 数字金融_自营金融

columns.name: is_public
columns.description: 是否公域展位；1（公域）/ 0（非公域）

columns.name: environment
columns.description: 环境标识；R: Released（线上）/ P: Pre（预发）

examples:
SELECT 
    delivery_task_id,
    delivery_task_name,
    space_name,
    industry_org_name,
    start_time,
    end_time
FROM dim_hk_asap_mkt_delivery_task_dd
WHERE dt = '${bizdate}'
  AND delivery_task_status = 'RELEASED'
  AND start_time <= NOW()
  AND end_time >= NOW()
  AND environment = 'R'
ORDER BY start_time DESC

SELECT 
    industry_org_name,
    COUNT(*) AS task_cnt
FROM dim_hk_asap_mkt_delivery_task_dd
WHERE dt = '${bizdate}'
  AND environment = 'R'
GROUP BY industry_org_name
ORDER BY task_cnt DESC

SELECT 
    delivery_task_id,
    delivery_task_name,
    delivery_task_status,
    traffic_type,
    start_time,
    end_time
FROM dim_hk_asap_mkt_delivery_task_dd
WHERE dt = '${bizdate}'
  AND space_name = '首页feeds'
  AND environment = 'R'
ORDER BY gmt_create DESC

tables.description: 展位信息维度表，存储展位的配置信息和属性

columns.name: space_name
columns.description: 展位名称；首页feeds, 首页Banner样式A展位

columns.name: industry_org_name
columns.description: 行业名称；数字生活_积分, 数字金融_自营金融

columns.name: is_public
columns.description: 是否公域展位；1（公域）/ 0（非公域）

columns.name: space_type
columns.description: 展位类型；BANNER, FEEDS, CORNER, CARD

columns.name: environment
columns.description: 环境标识；R: Released（线上）/ P: Pre（预发）

examples:
SELECT 
    space_id,
    space_code,
    space_name,
    industry_org_name,
    is_public
FROM dim_hk_asap_space_info_dd
WHERE dt = '${bizdate}'
  AND space_status = 'ONLINE'
  AND environment = 'R'
ORDER BY space_name

SELECT 
    industry_org_name,
    COUNT(*) AS space_cnt
FROM dim_hk_asap_space_info_dd
WHERE dt = '${bizdate}'
  AND environment = 'R'
GROUP BY industry_org_name
ORDER BY space_cnt DESC

SELECT 
    space_id,
    space_code,
    space_name,
    industry_org_name
FROM dim_hk_asap_space_info_dd
WHERE dt = '${bizdate}'
  AND is_public = 1
  AND space_status = 'ONLINE'
  AND environment = 'R'
ORDER BY industry_org_name, space_name

tables.description: 内容维度表，存储投放内容的配置信息和属性

columns.name: title
columns.description: 投放内容标题；流失電訊用戶首頁卡片

columns.name: content_type
columns.description: 内容类型；STATIC_CONTENT, POINT_TASK, BENEFIT, SALE_BENEFIT, EXCHANGE, BRAND, TICKET, MINI_APP, SIM

columns.description: 环境标识；R: Released（线上）/ P: Pre（预发）

SELECT 
    content_id,
    title,
    content_type,
    gmt_create
FROM dim_hk_asap_content_dd
WHERE dt = '${bizdate}'
  AND content_status = 'ONLINE'
  AND environment = 'R'
ORDER BY gmt_create DESC

SELECT 
    content_type,
    COUNT(*) AS content_cnt
FROM dim_hk_asap_content_dd
WHERE dt = '${bizdate}'
  AND environment = 'R'
GROUP BY content_type

    content_id,
    title,
    content_url,
    gmt_create
FROM dim_hk_asap_content_dd
WHERE dt = '${bizdate}'
  AND content_type = 'BENEFIT'
  AND content_status = 'ONLINE'
  AND environment = 'R'
ORDER BY gmt_create DESC
LIMIT 10

tables.description: 行业信息维度表，存储行业组织架构和分类信息

columns.name: industry_org_name
columns.description: 行业名称；数字生活_积分, 数字金融_自营金融, 数字支付_交通

columns.name: parent_industry_org_id
columns.description: 父级行业ID；用于构建行业层级

columns.name: environment
columns.description: 环境标识；R: Released（线上）/ P: Pre（预发）

examples:
SELECT 
    industry_org_id,
    industry_org_name,
    industry_level
FROM dim_hk_asap_industry_info_dd
WHERE dt = '${bizdate}'
  AND industry_status = 'ACTIVE'
  AND environment = 'R'
ORDER BY industry_org_name

SELECT 
    industry_org_id,
    industry_org_name
FROM dim_hk_asap_industry_info_dd
WHERE dt = '${bizdate}'
  AND industry_level = 1
  AND industry_status = 'ACTIVE'
  AND environment = 'R'
ORDER BY industry_org_name

SELECT 
    industry_org_id,
    industry_org_name,
    industry_level
FROM dim_hk_asap_industry_info_dd
WHERE dt = '${bizdate}'
  AND parent_industry_org_id = '${parent_industry_org_id}'
  AND industry_status = 'ACTIVE'
  AND environment = 'R'
ORDER BY industry_org_name

business_terms.sql: 无需 space 过滤，必须加 AND environment = 'R'
business_terms.mapped_value: 无需 space 过滤，必须加 AND environment = 'R'

business_terms.sql: dt BETWEEN 上周一 AND 上周日
business_terms.mapped_value: dt BETWEEN 上周一 AND 上周日

concepts.description: 投放位置，如首页Banner、弹窗、列表卡片等
投放物料，如图片、活动、权益、商品等
投放任务，控制投放时间、范围、内容等
业务分类维度，用于组织投放资源

table_selection_rules.scenario: 查曝光PV/点击PV/UV/CTR/日均/趋势/同比
按展位/任务/行业/内容/流量类型/坑位分组
查展位/任务/内容/行业的属性、名称
table_selection_rules.reason: 维度信息在 DIM 层

table_selection_rules.scenario: 需要事件级（每次曝光/点击）明细

metrics.name: 曝光UV
metrics.expression: COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN expo_pv_1d > 0 THEN user_id END)

metrics.name: 点击UV
metrics.expression: COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN clk_pv_1d > 0 THEN user_id END)

metrics.name: PV CTR
metrics.description: 点击PV / 曝光PV，保留4位小数

metrics.name: 日均PV CTR
metrics.description: 多日区间内日均点击率

examples:
SELECT  dt
        ,space_code
        ,SUM(expo_pv_1d)                                       AS expo_pv
        ,SUM(clk_pv_1d)                                        AS clk_pv
        ,ROUND(SUM(clk_pv_1d) / NULLIF(SUM(expo_pv_1d), 0), 4) AS pv_ctr
FROM    anthk_sg.dws_hk_asap_mkt_distribute_index_1d
WHERE   dt = '${bizdate}'
AND     environment = 'R'
AND     space_code = 'HK_HOME_PAGE_FEEDS_LIST'
GROUP BY dt
        ,space_code;

SELECT  industry_org_name
        ,SUM(expo_pv_1d)                                          AS expo_pv
        ,ROUND(SUM(expo_pv_1d) / SUM(SUM(expo_pv_1d)) OVER (), 4) AS pv_ratio
FROM    anthk_sg.dws_hk_asap_mkt_distribute_index_1d
WHERE   dt = '${bizdate}'
AND     environment = 'R'
GROUP BY industry_org_name
ORDER BY pv_ratio DESC;

SELECT  space_code
        ,SUM(CASE
                    WHEN dt = '${bizdate}' THEN expo_pv_1d
                    ELSE 0
             END) AS today_expo_pv
        ,SUM(CASE
                    WHEN dt = TO_CHAR(DATEADD(TO_DATE('${bizdate}', 'yyyyMMdd'), -7, 'dd'), 'yyyyMMdd') THEN expo_pv_1d
                    ELSE 0
             END) AS last_week_expo_pv
FROM    anthk_sg.dws_hk_asap_mkt_distribute_index_1d
WHERE   dt IN ('${bizdate}', TO_CHAR(DATEADD(TO_DATE('${bizdate}', 'yyyyMMdd'), -7, 'dd'), 'yyyyMMdd'))
AND     environment = 'R'
GROUP BY space_code;

SELECT  s.space_name
        ,s.space_status
        ,i.industry_org_name
        ,COUNT(*)                  AS expo_pv
        ,COUNT(DISTINCT e.user_id) AS expo_uv
FROM    (
            SELECT  *
            FROM    anthk_sg.dwd_hk_asap_mkt_log_expo_di
            WHERE   dt = '${bizdate}'
        ) e
JOIN    (
            SELECT  *
            FROM    anthk_sg.dim_hk_asap_space_info_dd
            WHERE   dt = '${bizdate}'
        ) s
ON      e.space_id = s.space_id
JOIN    (
            SELECT  *
            FROM    anthk_sg.dim_hk_asap_industry_info_dd
            WHERE   dt = '${bizdate}'
        ) i
ON      e.industry_org_id = i.industry_org_id
GROUP BY s.space_name
        ,s.space_status
        ,i.industry_org_name

SELECT  space_code
        ,SUM(expo_pv_1d)                                       AS expo_pv
        ,SUM(clk_pv_1d)                                        AS clk_pv
        ,ROUND(SUM(clk_pv_1d) / NULLIF(SUM(expo_pv_1d), 0), 4) AS pv_ctr
FROM    anthk_sg.dws_hk_asap_mkt_distribute_index_1d
WHERE   dt = '${bizdate}'
AND     environment = 'R'
GROUP BY space_code
ORDER BY pv_ctr DESC
